headline: Regency Centers Invites You to Join Its Second Quarter 2026 Earnings Conference Call
summary: JACKSONVILLE, Fla., June 25, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Regency Centers Corporation (“Regency Centers” or the “Company”) (NASDAQ: REG) will announce its second quarter 2026 earnings results on Wednesday, July 29, 2026, after the market closes. The Company’s earnings release and supplemental information package will be posted on the Investor Relations section of the Company’s website – investors.regencycenters.com. The Company will host an earnings conference call on Thursday, July 30, 2026, at 11:
